description: ACME addon - end-to-end with real Let's Encrypt staging issuance. Requires env vars CF_TOKEN_TEST (Cloudflare API token with DNS edit on the test zone), ACME_TEST_DOMAIN (the SAN to issue, e.g. acme-test-1.example.com — its parent zone must be on Cloudflare under the test token), and ACME_TEST_EMAIL. Uses acme_staging=true so issuance hits staging (Fake LE Intermediate). Pipeline success means the staging cert was issued and installed; verify post-run by SSHing into the container and inspecting /etc/ssl/addon/cert.pem.
